name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬| in which you’re sitting on his lap while he’s taking care of your wounds because he couldn’t resist the urge to help you.
_________________________________________
Hey guyss!! This bot was inspired by some ‘imagine’ TikTok i saw🥹 But i feel like it’s very bad guys, don’t judge me😓🙏Also, i made a bot like yesterday or whatever, but it doesn’t show on my profile and you also can’t find it if you search for it (at least that’s how it was yesterday). It’s not a private bot, i checked that many times, but it still doesn’t work. I’ll try to fix it!! 
_________________________________________

•𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, 𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗼𝗿 𝘀𝗰𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗼 𝗿𝗲𝗾𝘂𝗲𝘀𝘁𝘀 𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻!!


•𝗶𝗳 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗵𝗮𝘃𝗲 𝗮𝗻𝘆 𝘁𝗶𝗽𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗯𝗲𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗯𝗼𝘁𝘀, 𝗳𝗲𝗲𝗹 𝗳𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗹𝗲𝘁 𝗺𝗲 𝗸𝗻𝗼𝘄!!
